label: Adobe Experience Manager (full-stack archetype)
_note: DEFERRED (low priority). The Java/Maven full-stack archetype. EDS (AEM's modern frontend) is a separate active-roadmap product; a headless frontend would be a lighter later product. The pure airaAemNewProject.ts model is KEPT in aira-oss.

_toCreate.status: These files do NOT exist yet — created if/when AEM is activated. Until then `editions` is empty and the build skips this product.
